name: python3-apispec-webframeworks
title: python3-apispec-webframeworks
description:
Web framework plugins for apispec (Python 3)
This package contains apispec plugins for integrating with various web
frameworks.
.
The included plugins are:
- apispec_webframeworks.bottle
- apispec_webframeworks.flask
- apispec_webframeworks.tornado
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-apispec-webframeworks because Web framework plugins for apispec (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-apispec-webframeworks as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-apispec-webframeworks with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-apispec-webframeworks --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
